category_sources: Official README describes Dust as du plus Rust and a way to see where disk is used.
source_facts.description says dust is a more intuitive version of du in Rust.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains Dust usage and installation documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instructions repo is returned as null and not rechecked.
tags_sources: Official README describes inspecting where disk space is used.
source_facts.description identifies dust as a Rust version of du.
